run_name.description: The @register_run function to classify. When omitted, the composite resolves it from discover-runs: if exactly one run exists it is used; if several exist, the composite returns spec_invalid (ambiguous_run) listing the candidates.
run_name.title: Run Name

data_axis.description: A caller-resolved classification (the interview / slash path, after a human-facing dialog). When present the composite records it directly as classified_by='interview' and runs neither recall nor the matcher.

root.description: Experiments root forwarded to the preflight's recall sub-call. When omitted, recall falls back to ~/.hpc-agent/config.json:experiment_roots.
root.title: Root

task_kind.description: Forwarded to the preflight's recall --task-kind to scope prior campaigns.
task_kind.title: Task Kind

kind.description: How the series axis is safe to split. 'independent': the loop body is a pure function of its row. 'associative': it accumulates an associative summary — also set `monoid`. 'bounded_halo': it depends on a bounded look-back window — also set `halo`. 'sequential': unbounded / order-dependent state, not splittable; the fail-safe default. 'cartesian': there is no ordered series to split — a plain cartesian sweep (distinct from 'independent', which has a parallelizable series). Recorded only on a confident no-loop signal; anything ambiguous stays 'sequential'.
kind.title: Kind

monoid.description: For kind='associative': the built-in monoid chunks reduce with.
monoid.title: Monoid

_HaloConfig.description: The bounded look-back distance of a :class:`BoundedHalo` series axis.

expr.description: Arithmetic expression giving the warm-up row count, over the run()'s own parameter names (bare names, resolved from the sweep point), e.g. 'train_window * 48'. Evaluated by hpc_agent.experiment_kit.axis_config with a restricted AST walk — only names, numeric literals, + - * //, and min()/max() are permitted; never eval().
expr.title: Expr

_HaloConfig.title: _HaloConfig
